title: Parallel Experiment Simulator
lede: Orchestrate parallel UI experiments and resolve paper cuts simultaneously by managing autonomous engineering agents.

sections.title: Managerial Intent
sections.body: Goal: Eliminate paper cuts in the checkout flow. Experiment with button colours and form behaviour to improve mobile conversion. Spawn distinct variants for user testing.

sections.title: Spawned Workstreams
sections.description: Parallel experiments currently being generated by agentic engineers.
rows: Update primary button colours and contrast

sections.title: Delivery Velocity
sections.description: Comparison of shipped experiments over time.
sections.emptyMessage: Not enough data to visualise velocity.

demoSteps: Review the 'Managerial Intent' text to understand the prompt given to the agents.
Observe the 'Spawned Workstreams' table to see how a single prompt creates multiple parallel UI variants.
Check the 'Delivery Velocity' chart to see the exponential jump in PRs shipped once agentic parallelisation is introduced.
notes: The 'Delivery Velocity' chart is hardcoded to illustrate the narrative of breaking past human linear limits.
Use static mock data for the variants to ensure a deterministic demo.
